hero.description: Upload observations from the field and certify the work you've done. Your photos, species, and locations become permanent, verifiable records of real environmental impact.

verified.title: Verified environmental impact
verified.description: Every record is backed by photos, geolocation data, and community verification.

direct.title: Direct community funding
direct.description: Your support goes straight to the stewards doing on-ground restoration work.

transparent.title: Decentralized & transparent
transparent.description: Your work, verified. Unchangeable proof of restoration that builds your reputation with donors and communities.

paths.title: Choose Your Path
paths.description: Whether you're here to fund impact or showcase your work, there's a place for you.

funders.label: For Funders
funders.title: I want to support
funders.description: Browse verified records of real environmental work — the exact moments of restoration, as they happened on the ground.

organizations.label: For Organizations
organizations.title: I am a nature
organizations.description: Showcase your regenerative work and connect with funders who care.

digitalCertificate.question: A digital record of impact
digitalCertificate.answer: A record captures a specific environmental action — giving it a permanent, verifiable identity on an open, decentralized network (the same technology that powers Bluesky).

evidence.question: Backed by real evidence
evidence.answer: Photos, geolocation, timestamps, monitoring data. Every claim is verifiable. This isn't a promise of future impact — it's proof of work already done.

communities.question: A direct line to communities
communities.answer: Each record names the people doing the restoration. The communities on the ground stay credited for their work — no intermediaries, no vague overhead.

story.question: Your claim to the story
story.answer: A record is your claim to that moment: a tree planted, a reef restored, an ecosystem revived. Yours to share, cite, and build a reputation on.

certificate.previewDescription: Community-led restoration of native forest in West Java, Indonesia. 5,000 trees planted across 12 hectares.

maEarthBanner.label: Ma Earth Funding Round 3
maEarthBanner.title: Apply for the Ma Earth Funding Round 3
maEarthBanner.description: GainForest communities can use their verified project stories, evidence, and impact records while applying on Ma Earth’s community-backed funding round.

openNetwork.description: Your records are portable — impact data that can travel across apps, communities, and funding tools, not a closed database. Support for Silvi and other platforms is coming soon.

maEarth.blurb: Communities can use their verified evidence when applying for community-backed funding rounds.

gainforest.blurb: GainForest helps nature stewards publish verified work, sites, trees, observations, and project stories.

hypercerts.blurb: Open impact claims can connect with broader Hypercerts tooling and public-good funding ecosystems.

openNetwork.storageNote: When stewards upload observations, the records are saved under their GainForest account — or the organization account they manage — so it is clear where the data lives.
